name: astragalus membranaceus
title: astragalus membranaceus benefits
description: Astragalus membranaceus reduces oxidative stress, which refers to the imbalance between the production of free radicals and the body's ability to neutralize them, leading to cell damage and contributing to various diseases. This benefit is important because oxidative stress can cause inflammation, DNA damage, and even cell death, which can contribute to chronic conditions such as cancer, diabetes, and neurodegenerative diseases, and may also accelerate the aging process.
